title: Mount Pritchard and District Community Club Ltd — Systemic failures
investigation_objective: AUSTRAC commenced Federal Court civil penalty proceedings on 30 July 2025 against Mount Pritchard and District Community Club Ltd, trading as Mounties, alleging serious and systemic non-compliance with AML/CTF laws, including operating without a compliant AML/CTF program and failing to appropriately monitor high-risk customers. The club group operates approximately 1,400 poker machines across 8 of its 10 venues and generates hundreds of millions of dollars in gaming revenue annually. The matter remains before the Federal Court.
scope: Subject of Federal Court civil penalty proceedings brought by AUSTRAC, ongoing; Alleged to have operated without a compliant AML/CTF program across a large-scale poker machine operation; Alleged failure to appropriately monitor high-risk customers; Operates roughly 1,400 poker machines generating hundreds of millions of dollars in gaming revenue annually
